chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 14 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 11.02.2026 Mr. Faryad Ali Dudi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Additional Prosecutor General does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of with directions to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
